document.title: 성능시험성적서 (Performance Test Report)
standards: Korea Good Manufacturing Practices of Medical Devices

sourceSummary.oneLine: H&abyz Performance Test Report A-PTR-BLU Rev. 0 confirms performance settings for medical imaging acquisition device models G1417CW, G1417FW, G1717CW, G1717FW, G1417CWP, G1417FWP, G1717CWP, and G1717FWP.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Performance confirmation evidence for the medical imaging acquisition device technical documentation in a domestic manufacturing certification package.
keyPoints: The report identifies manufacturer H&abyz Co., Ltd., product name 의료영상획득장치, Doc No. A-PTR-BLU, Rev. No. 0, and issue date 2025.04.08.
Testing was performed from 2025.04.07 to 2025.04.08 at H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do.

All summarized performance items are marked PASS, including CsI deposition thickness, sensor type, scintillator, effective pixel number and area, pixel pitch, MTF, DQE, sensitivity, energy range, A/D conversion, wireless standard, IP range, communication, trigger mode, image acquisition, and image storage.
The conclusion states that the test results confirmed no abnormality in the performance settings of the medical imaging acquisition device (G1417CW 외 7종).
Attachments include a-Si, IGZO, CsI, WiFi module, IP68 test reports for G1417CW and G1717CW, IMX8 datasheet, and KGMP certificate evidence.

evidence.claim: The document is Performance Test Report A-PTR-BLU Rev. No. 0 issued on 2025.04.08.
evidence.evidenceText: 성능시험성적서 (Performance Test Report) Doc No. A-PTR-BLU Rev. No. 0 Issue date 2025.04.08

evidence.claim: The report covers the medical imaging acquisition device models G1417CW, G1417FW, G1717CW, G1717FW, G1417CWP, G1417FWP, G1717CWP, and G1717FWP.
evidence.evidenceText: Product name: 의료영상획득장치 - Model Name: G1417CW, G1417FW, G1717CW, G1717FW, G1417CWP, G1417FWP, G1717CWP, G1717FWP

evidence.claim: The report states it is for performance confirmation of the medical imaging acquisition device G1417CW and seven other models.
evidence.evidenceText: 본 시험 성적서는 의료영상획득장치 (G1417CW 외 7 종)의 성능 확인을 위한 시험성적서이다.

evidence.claim: The test period was 2025.04.07 to 2025.04.08 at H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do.
evidence.evidenceText: 시험일시: 2025.04.07~2025.04.08; 시험장소: ㈜에이치앤아비즈 (경기도 용인시 처인구 처인성로41-16 2동 1층일부)

evidence.claim: All performance summary items in the report are marked PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: 시험 결과 요약 ... CsI Deposition Thickness ... PASS ... 영상저장 ... PASS

evidence.claim: 300 μm type CsI deposition thickness measured 338.41 μm and 500 μm type measured 507.54 μm, satisfying criteria.
evidence.evidenceText: 시험 결과 1) 300μm type : 338.41μm 기준치 만족 2) 500μm type : 507.54μm 기준치 만족

evidence.claim: Sensor type criteria were PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) for G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1717CW, G1717CWP and Flexible PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) for G1417FW, G1417FWP, G1717FW, G1717FWP.
evidence.evidenceText: Sensor Type (센서 타입 확인) PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) ... Flexible PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) ... PASS

evidence.claim: Scintillator criterion for all eight models was CsI and the result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Scintillator 확인 CsI 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Effective pixel number criteria were 2500 x 3052 pixels or higher for G1417 models, 3040 x 3040 pixels or higher for G1717CW/G1717CWP, and 3072 x 3072 pixels or higher for G1717FW/G1717FWP.
evidence.evidenceText: Effective Pixel Number 확인 2500 x 3052 pixels 이상 ... G1717CW G1717CWP 3040 x 3040 pixels 이상 ... G1717FW G1717FWP 3072 x 3072 pixels 이상 ... PASS

evidence.claim: Effective pixel area criteria were 350 x 427.3 mm ±10%, 425.6 x 425.6 mm ±10%, and 430.1 x 430.1 mm ±10% depending on model group.
evidence.evidenceText: Effective Pixel Area 확인 350 x 427.3mm ± 10% 이내 ... 425.6 x 425.6mm ± 10% 이내 ... 430.1 x 430.1mm ± 10% 이내 ... PASS

evidence.claim: The common pixel pitch criterion was 140 μm ±10% and the result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: 공통 Pixel pitch 140μm ± 10% ... PASS

evidence.claim: MTF testing used RQA5 beam condition, 70 kV, 40 mAs, 21 mm Al filter, SID 150 cm, and the result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: MTF Phantom 영상 이미지를 획득하여 Calibration 적용 후 ‘Final Test’ 프로그램을 사용한 측정값이 시험 기준을 만족하는지 확인한다. * 조사 조건 RQA5 Beam condition, 70kV, 40mAs 21mm Al filter SID: 150cm PASS

evidence.claim: DQE testing used RQA5 beam condition, 70 kV, 40 mAs, 21 mm Al filter, SID 150 cm, and the result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: DQE Bright 영상 이미지를 획득하여 Calibration 적용 후 ‘Final Test’ 프로그램을 사용한 측정값이 시험 기준을 만족하는지 확인한다. * 조사 조건 RQA5 Beam condition, 70kV, 40mAs 21mm Al filter SID: 150cm PASS

evidence.claim: Sensitivity criteria were center 110 LSB/uGy or higher for non-P models and center 150 LSB/uGy or higher for P models, with all listed results PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Sensitivity Center 기준 110 LSB/uGy 이상 ... G1417CWP Center 기준 150 LSB/uGy 이상 ... PASS

evidence.claim: Energy range criterion was normal operation when irradiated at 40 kvp and 150 kvp, with all listed models PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Energy range 40kvp, 150kvp 정상동작 ... 40kvp / 150kvp로 조사시 영상획득되는지 확인. PASS

evidence.claim: A/D conversion uses 16-bit ROIC board data and converts to 14-bit by removing the lower 2 bits.
evidence.evidenceText: ROIC 보드의 A/D 변환 해상도는 16bit이며, 하위 2비트를 제거하여 14bit로 변환하여 사용하는 방식임.

evidence.claim: Wireless standard verification criterion was IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac by WiFi module specification, with result PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Wireless standard IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac Wifi 모듈 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: IP range criterion was IP68 according to IEC 60529, with result PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IP Range IP68 IEC 60529에 따른다 PASS

evidence.claim: Communication criterion was 1Giga-bit Ethernet by specification review, with result PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Communication 1Giga-bit Ethernet 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Trigger mode tests covered Line trigger mode and Auto trigger mode, both normal operation with PASS results.
evidence.evidenceText: Trigger mode Line trigger 모드 정상동작 ... PASS Auto trigger 모드 정상동작 ... PASS

evidence.claim: The conclusion states the test results confirmed no abnormality in the performance settings of the medical imaging acquisition device G1417CW and seven models.
evidence.evidenceText: 해당 시험 결과를 통해 의료영상획득장치 (G1417CW 외 7종)의 성능 설정값에 이상 없음을 확인하였다.

evidence.claim: The G1417CW IP68 test report used IEC 60529:1989 + A1:1999 + A2:2013 and reported no probe pass, no dust deposits, and no water deposits within the enclosure.
evidence.evidenceText: Test Method Used : IEC 60529:1989+ A1:1999 + A2:2013 ... No pass of probe were found ... No traces of dust deposits ... No Water deposits were found

evidence.claim: The G1717CW IP68 test report used IEC 60529:1989 + A1:1999 + A2:2013 and reported no probe pass, no dust deposits, and no water deposits within the enclosure.
evidence.evidenceText: Test Method Used : IEC 60529:1989+ A1:1999 + A2:2013 ... No pass of probe were found ... No traces of dust deposits ... No Water deposits were found

evidence.claim: The KGMP certificate states the manufacturer complies with Korea Good Manufacturing Practices of Medical Devices for the listed product group.
evidence.evidenceText: We hereby certify that the above manufacturer complies with Korea Good Manufacturing Practices of Medical Devices for the product group listed above

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is ambiguous: source metadata indicates MFDS/domestic, but the main report is manufacturer-issued by H&abyz and attachments include third-party testing and KGMP certification rather than an MFDS-issued approval.

Source text includes multiple embedded attachment documents with their own dates, revisions, and authorities; document metadata was extracted from the main Performance Test Report unless otherwise stated in evidence.
The KGMP certificate text shows Date of Issue 2025.10.16 and Date of Expiration 2022.10.17, which appears chronologically inconsistent in the extracted text.
Some attachment OCR text contains typographical/OCR artifacts such as 'DATASHHET', 'manufacturers' corrupted text, and inconsistent report revision numbering in IP68 attachments.
